arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool make the trip to Germany to face RB Leipzig in the Champions League on Wednesday evening. The Reds have attained maximum points thus far in the competition, whilst their opponents are yet to get off the mark after two tough defeats. Lois Openda is a doubt for the hosts after the Belgian picked up […] The post RB Leipzig vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool set for Adidas kit switch as '£60m' figure likely to go far higher
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to switch from Nike to Adidas at the end of the current deal in 2025

arts.ttl: Everton get controversial Liverpool vs Chelsea referee they fumed over three times last season
arts.sum: Everton's next game at home to Fulham will be refereed by John Brooks, who was at the centre of controversy after all three Blues matches he took charge of last season

arts.ttl: When is Leipzig - Liverpool? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: RB Leipzig has had a mixed run, with wins over Mainz 2-0 and Heidenheim 1-0, but a loss to Juventus 2-3. Form guide for Leipzig - Liverpool

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Liverpool are aiming to make it three Champions League victories on the bounce this Wednesday when they travel to RB Leipzig. RB Leipzig predicted lineup vs Liverpool (3-4-2-1) : Gulacsi; Klostermann, Orban, Lukeba; Geertruida, Kampl, Haidara, Nusa; Simons, Sesko; Openda.
